personality_one_liner: A high-octane, command-center aesthetic echoing premium combat sports and F1—sharp, adrenaline-fueled, and unyieldingly bold.

spacing.rule: Use rigid, intentional grid spacing. Elements should feel like a dense but highly organized dashboard. Avoid floaty padding.

do's: Use on the sticky bottom action bar containing the primary 'Buy Tickets' CTA.
Use as a dark frosted overlay over the hero image to ensure Bebas Neue headlines pop.
dont's: Do not use glass on content cards or accordion rows. Keep structural elements solid surfaceSecondary for max utility and contrast.

screens.name: Landing
screens.purpose: A high-conversion, scrollable cinematic landing page capturing leads and selling tickets through urgency and premium sports appeal.

states.loading: Centered electric blue pulse animation matching the athletic pace.
states.error: Bold error state with a silver/white 'Reload Mission' CTA.

screens.layout: 1. Hero Section: Cinematic full-bleed stadium image with a heavy gradient-to-dark scrim (top-to-bottom transparent to #0A0A0A at 80%+ opacity). Headline 'LET'S RIDE TASMANIA' in oversized Bebas Neue. 2. Countdown Timer: Stacked, rigid segmented controls displaying days/hours/mins. 3. About & Why Attend: Hard-aligned, 2-column grid using surfaceSecondary backgrounds and thin borders (#292929). 4. Event Info & Sponsor Grid: Logos structured in monochromatic or silver-tinted blocks. 5. Sticky Bottom CTA: Pinned outside the ScrollView, containing a full-width 'Buy Tickets' button over a glassmorphism base to ensure it's always accessible.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility DARK guidelines. Use #0A0A0A (Midnight Black) and Electric Blue (#0A44FF) as the sole high-contrast accent. Avoid all other blues/purples.
Do NOT use cowboy/rustic aesthetics. The UI must feel like a modern, premium UFC or Formula 1 event app (sharp borders, strong typographic hierarchy, high contrast).
Use Bebas Neue for all headlines (oversized, uppercase) and Manrope for readable body copy. Ensure line lengths are 30-40 characters where possible.
The Hero Section MUST contain the stadium image with a strict gradient-to-dark scrim fading to #0A0A0A at the bottom. The text must sit in the darkest portion of the scrim to guarantee WCAG contrast.

Implement a sticky 'Buy Tickets' CTA at the bottom of the screen (outside the ScrollView or anchored via absolute positioning) with a glass background behind it, so users can buy tickets at any point during scroll.
Countdown timer should look like a live operational metric, utilizing rigid containers or segmented blocks.
All forms (Ticket / Sponsor Lead Capture) should appear in a @gorhom/bottom-sheet with a surfaceSecondary background.
